document.title: IEC 60601-1 Test Report: Medical Electrical Equipment Part 1, General requirements for basic safety and essential performance

sourceSummary.oneLine: CB Scheme IEC 60601-1 test report for H&abyz digital flat panel X-ray detector models G1717 and G1417 series.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports electrical and mechanical safety, basic safety and essential performance evidence for medical electrical equipment conformity assessment.
keyPoints: Report No. ACTS-2024-SM-241 was issued on 2025-02-20 by ACTS Co., Ltd.
The tested item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
All applicable tests according to the referenced standards were carried out, while biocompatibility and electromagnetic compatibility were not evaluated in this report.
G1717CW was tested as the representative worst-case model for listed G1717 and G1417 variant models.
The product is classified as portable, continuous operation, internally powered and appliance coupler supplied, with Type B applied part and IP68 ingress protection.

entities.evidence: This report is not valid as a CB Test Report unless signed by an approved IECEE Testing Laboratory and appended to a CB Test Certificate issued by an NCB in accordance with IECEE 02.

evidence.claim: The report number is ACTS-2024-SM-241 and the issue date is 2025-02-20.
evidence.evidenceText: Report Number : ACTS-2024-SM-241; Date of issue : 2025-02-20

evidence.claim: The test item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Test item description : Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report covers models G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW and G1417FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Model/Type reference : G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW and G1417FWP

evidence.claim: G1717CW was used as the representative worst-case model for testing.
evidence.evidenceText: All of testing was conducted with the model “G1717CW” as representative. ... Consequently, the worst-case model, G1717CW, was designated as the main model for testing.

evidence.claim: The core test standard was IEC 60601-1:2005 with AMD1:2012 and AMD2:2020.
The test procedure was the CB Scheme.
evidence.evidenceText: Test procedure : CB Scheme

evidence.claim: The product fulfils EN 60601-1:2006/A1:2013/A12:2014/A2:2021/A13:2024 requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: The product fulfils the requirements of EN 60601-1:2006/A1:2013/A12:2014/A2:2021/A13:2024

evidence.claim: Biocompatibility and electromagnetic compatibility were not evaluated in this IEC 60601-1 report.
evidence.evidenceText: The following clauses were not evaluated in this report. - Clause 11.7, Biocompatibility - Clause 17, Electromagnetic compatibility

evidence.claim: The detector is intended for screening and diagnosis using diagnostic radiographic exposures of multiple body parts.
evidence.evidenceText: These detectors are intended for use by a qualified/trained doctor or technician on both adult subjects for taking diagnostic radiographic exposures of the skull, spinal column, chest, abdomen, extremities, and other body parts.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: The equipment rating is 15 V d.c., 6 A, with certified AC/DC adaptor and internal battery power information provided.
evidence.evidenceText: Ratings : Equipment: 15 V d.c., 6 A; Certified AC/DC Adaptor: Input: 100-240 V a.c., 50-60 Hz, 1.3 A-0.5 A; Output: 15 V d.c., 6.0 A; Internally powered: 11.55 V d.c., 6660 mAh
evidence.pageTarget: G1717 and G1417 Detector Electrical Ratings

evidence.claim: The equipment is portable and operates continuously.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of installation and use : Portable; Mode of operation : Continuous

evidence.claim: The applied part classification is Type B applied part with carbon plate.
evidence.evidenceText: TYPE B APPLIED PART Carbon plate

evidence.claim: The device has IP68 ingress protection under IEC 60529.
evidence.evidenceText: ENCLOSURES classified according to degree of protection against ingress of water and particulate matter as per IEC 60529 : IP68

evidence.claim: The AC/DC adaptor BM090S15F was certified to IEC 60601-1 at UL Solutions Demko.
evidence.evidenceText: The AC/DC Adaptor (model: BM090S15F, manufactured by BRIDGEPOWER CORP) has been certified in accordance with IEC 60601-1 at UL Solutions Demko (Ref. Certif. No. DK-146656-UL).

evidence.claim: The rechargeable Li-ion battery MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, 3ICP4/60/80 was certified to IEC 62133-2 at UL Solutions Demko.
evidence.evidenceText: The Rechargeable Li-ion Battery (model: MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, 3ICP4/60/80, manufactured by MPLUS ELECTRONICS CO LTD) has been certified in accordance with IEC 62133-2 at UL Solutions Demko (Ref. Certif. No. DK-158201-UL).

evidence.claim: Korea national differences were attached for information under MFDS Notification No. 2020-12, Annex 1.
evidence.evidenceText: Republic of Korea NATIONAL DIFFERENCES ... Differences according to : Notification of MFDS No. 2020-12, Annex 1

evidence.claim: Korean national differences require 60 Hz supply frequency or a frequency range including 60 Hz.
evidence.evidenceText: Only appliances having supply frequency of 60 Hz or a frequency range including 60 Hz are accepted. 50-60 Hz (AC/DC Adaptor) P

evidence.claim: Korean national differences require instruction manuals and safety-related markings to be in Korean or IEC graphical symbols when supplied to Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Instruction manuals and appliance markings related safety, including nameplate shall be in Korean or graphical symbols in accordance with IEC Publication 417. Korean is to be used when the equipment is supplied to Korea.

evidence.claim: The Annex A usability report was issued for IEC 60601-1-6 under report number ACTS-2024-SM-241_Annex A.
evidence.evidenceText: Annex A – IEC 60601-1-6 Test Report ... Report Number : ACTS-2024-SM-241_Annex A; Date of issue : 2025-02-20

evidence.claim: The usability engineering process was evaluated against IEC 62366-1:2015+A1:2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Inspection of the USABILITY ENGINEERING FILE verified that the MANUFACTURER demonstrated compliance with IEC 62366-1:2015+A1:2020.

evidence.claim: The software safety class was classified as Class B.
evidence.evidenceText: Software development process for Software Classification applied in accordance with Clause 4.3 and 4.4 of IEC 62304:2006 and IEC 62304:2006/AMD1:2015: Software Class: B

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit document revision or version for the main test report was found; report number and TRF identifiers are present but revisionOrVersion is empty.
Authority context is mixed: source metadata indicates MFDS/domestic, while the source text is primarily an IECEE CB Scheme test report with Korea national differences attached for information.
Large schematic, PCB, user manual, and IEC 60529 attachment sections contain little or no extractable text in the preprocessed source.
Product description refers to 'B Series' while the model/type references are G1717 and G1417 series; this may require product-family confirmation.
